name: AppGrowing
description: AppGrowing — global mobile advertising intelligence and ad creative analytics platform monitoring ad campaigns across major media networks with AI-powered creative insights for advertisers.

seo.title: AppGrowing — App Growth Tooling (ASO)

when_to_use: Monitoring competitors ad creatives across TikTok, Meta, and Chinese networks
Identifying winning ad concepts using AI creative performance analysis
Tracking ad spend trends by category for market intelligence
Benchmarking UA creative strategy against top mobile game advertisers

pros: Covers major media networks, not just stores
AI-powered creative analytics for UA teams
Useful for spotting winning ad formats
cons: Creative intel focus, weak on keyword ASO
Pricing geared to performance teams, not indies
review.verdict: Strong ad creative spy tool for UA teams, but not an ASO platform by itself.
review.best_for: Performance marketers studying competitor ad creatives at scale
review.not_for: Teams that only need keyword and store metadata tools
